name: Delegated Shopper
description: Single-purpose agent that buys on the user's behalf when conditions are met: limited or timed drops (user not present), or price-cap monitoring, using AP2 open and closed mandates

skills.name: Drop & price delegated purchase
skills.description: Handles limited drops and price-cap monitoring: conversational budget agreement, signed mandates, then autonomous purchase when the item is available within the user's cap.
examples: When is the next drop of SuperShoe limited edition gold sneakers? I need a size 9 women.
I'm at work during the drop — can you buy the SuperShoe pair if I cap at $200?
